untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 5-day rolling spread percentile calculation — no rolling percentile indicator available; (2) limit order execution probability estimate — no execution probability indicator in allowed list; (3) bid-ask spread levels — no bid-ask spread indicator available; (4) comparison to prior bar bid/ask improvement — requires tick-level microstructure data not in allowed indicators. The core microstructure conditions (spread percentile, execution probability, bid-ask dynamics) cannot be expressed with available OHLCV-based indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on high-frequency microstructure analysis (bid-ask spreads, limit order queue dynamics, tick-level improvements) which requires market microstructure data unavailable in standard OHLCV backtesting engines. A proxy using volatility compression (atr_14 trend) and price action compression (body_pct) was attempted but does not capture the true signal intent.
